title: OSDUE Cat Catnip Toys, 3 Pack Kitten Toys Gradient Color Pillows, Interactive Cat Teeth Toy, Interactive Plush Cats Toy, Teeth Cleaning Playing Exercise Accessories
features: 【KITTEN KICK STICK TOY】—— It can help cats with chase and chew training and stimulate their hunting instincts. It promotes the happiness and health of cats and enhances the interaction between you and your cat.

【QUALITY MATERIALS】—— Made of high quality plush fabric and stretch cotton, soft and comfortable. The fabric is skin-friendly and will not cause allergies in kittens. Catnip pads are safe and durable, bite and tear resistant, can be used for a long time and can bring joy to your pet.
【TIE-DYE CRAFT】 —— Interactive cat toys. Plush surface stimulates cat's natural instincts. Tie-dye process makes our cat toys more colourful and cute!

【NATURAL CATNIP】—— This catnip toy is filled with natural catnip that cats love. The breathable fabric of the cat toy easily gives off the catnip scent. The gentle scent will keep your kitten entertained and increase your cat's activity level.
【TEETH CLEANING EFFECT】—— Soft and skin-friendly, it can help cats train hunting and chewing. Freshens breath, improves cat's oral environment and protects dental health.
